subject: Formula recommendations for 6 month old

subject: Absolutely terrible experience
email:
I am FURIOUS with Mumzworld right now. I ordered a crib for my newborn (MW-2024-40198) and it arrived with missing screws and a cracked side panel. This is a SAFETY HAZARD for my 2-month-old baby!! I've been trying to reach someone for 4 days and keep getting put on hold.

I want this escalated to a manager immediately. I'm filing a complaint with Dubai Consumer Protection and posting reviews everywhere until this is fixed. This is absolutely unacceptable for a company that claims to care about babies.

DISGUSTED CUSTOMER
